blended.narrative: Bluewood is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,016 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
